name: claude-context-pill
description: Token-usage tracker pinned to the claude.ai composer. Real BPE tokenizer with optional API calibration.
author: 25TH (@25thprmr)

scripts.verify: node -e "const m=require('./manifest.json'); const p=require('./package.json'); if(m.version!==p.version){console.error('manifest/package version mismatch:',m.version,'vs',p.version); process.exit(1)} console.log('versions match:',m.version)"
